name: 字得其乐WordJoy
short_description: Build Chinese characters to control the board. WordJoy is a tactical strategy game where Chinese character components become your pieces. Combine radicals to form real characters, flip tiles, trigger abilities, and outplay your opponent.
detailed_description:
WordJoy is a tactical word-building strategy game where Chinese characters become your weapons.

Place character components on a 3×3 board and combine them into real Chinese characters. Every completed character flips tiles, triggers special abilities, and changes the state of the board.

Each match is a puzzle of positioning, timing, and clever combinations.

A single character can completely turn the game around.

How It Plays

1. Place Components

Drop Chinese character components onto the board.

2. Form Characters

Combine nearby components to create valid Chinese characters.

3. Flip the Board

Completed characters flip tiles and activate special abilities.

Control more tiles than your opponent to win the match.

What Makes WordJoy Unique

WordJoy transforms the structure of Chinese characters into a strategic board game.

Instead of traditional words, you play with radicals and components.

Instead of spelling, you control the board through character construction.

Language becomes strategy.

Master the radicals. Control the board. Build your victory one character at a time.
